since_last: 10% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads -0.54%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 10% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.05% · Gold +0.32% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 10% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at -0.54%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at -0.54%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -11.16%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.86% at $127.36
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.86% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
